title: Various Variously Variegated Items
description: Adds rotations to multiple items such as candles, lanterns, and pots
body:
This pack adds rotations to several blocks, those being:

- flower pots
- candles
- turtle eggs
- sea pickles
- fences
- lanterns
- soul lanterns
- torches
- soul torches
- redstone torches

<hr>

Stand-alone versions can be found with all of my rotations packs in [this collection](https://modrinth.com/collection/Q0861PqC)

<hr>

Importantly, this pack is customizable (if you don't want to use the stand-alones); you can remove whichever rotations you do not want to happen, and leave only the ones you wish to have in the pack. To do this, simply go into the texture pack folder, and go to /assets/minecraft/blockstates and delete the corresponding files for the blocks that you do not want rotated.

<hr>

Hope y'all like it, and please let me know if there are any issues :)
<center>
